title: BEM-860 real Deno scheduler
objective: Implement real server-side mailbox polling for BEM-859 in Deno/Curator runtime, not only config files. Requirements: inspect the repo for Deno webhook/autonomy/curator scheduler code. Add a safe internal polling mechanism that checks governance/audit/mailbox/from_claude/BEM859_PROTOCOL_ALIGNMENT_RESPONSE.md every 60 seconds until one of APPROVED, APPROVED_WITH_AMENDMENTS, BLOCKED_WITH_REASON appears. When final status appears, write governance/runtime/mailbox_polling/BEM859_PROTOCOL_ALIGNMENT_RESULT.md and update governance/tasks/pending/BEM859_PROTOCOL_ALIGNMENT.md. Do not rely on external GPT chat wake-up. Do not add GitHub schedule triggers except existing allowed curator-hourly-report if already present. Do not write issue #31. No manual operator confirmation. If Deno runtime cannot access repo files directly, create a clear blocker file governance/runtime/mailbox_polling/BEM860_REAL_SCHEDULER_BLOCKER.md explaining exact missing capability and next code path to add. No issue comments.
